data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. CZ retweeted a tweet suggesting a potential dip; 2. Uniswap founder: The platform's trading volume today was nearly $9 billion, with no pressure or downtime; 3. A suspected new Bitmine wallet increased its holdings by 33,323 ETH, worth $126.4 million; 4. Zerobase founder: No stablecoins were converted to USDe or staked, and the related news is false; 5. Hyperliquid: The platform's traffic and trading volume both hit record highs, and the blockchain network did not experience any downtime or delays; 6. Polymarket: The market is betting on a 91% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in October; 7. Solana DEX's trading volume exceeded $8 billion yesterday, with Orca leading the way with $2.49 billion; 8. A whale purchased over 14,000 ETH worth $55.5 million through over-the-counter transactions; 9. The head of the Base protocol: The cost of listing coins on exchanges should be zero.

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Show Major Divergence In Inflows — What’s Happening?
data.description:
The spot Bitcoin ETFs (exchange-traded funds) have been in solid form over the past two weeks, laying a foundation for the strong price action experienced by the premier cryptocurrency recently. According to market data, the crypto-linked investment products opened the week with a daily inflow record of over $1. 21 billion. As of this writing, with data from Friday’s trading session yet to be included, the US-based Bitcoin ETFs are currently on a nine-day streak of positive inflows
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/spot-bitcoin-etfs-show-major-divergence/

data.title: WazirX loses appeal as Bombay High Court backs CoinSwitch
data.description:
WazirX has lost its appeal in the Bombay High Court after the court ruled in favor of CoinSwitch. According to the high court, CoinSwitch has the right to secure assets stolen during the $234 million hack of the WazirX platform in July 2025. According to reports, the court dismissed an appeal from Zanami Labs, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wazirx-loses-appeal-court-backs-coinswitch/

data.title: Cooker sold 2 million ASTER and bought 66,000 HYPE
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Cooker (@CookerFlips) sold 2 million ASTER tokens at $1.34 for $2.68 million USDC. The funds were then deposited into HyperLiquid and used to buy 66,485 HYPE tokens at $40.32. The HYPE tokens were then transferred to Kinetiq for staking.

data.title: Lighter Resumes Operations After Temporary Outage
data.description:
According to PANews, Lighter has announced the resumption of its operations. Previously, the platform experienced a temporary outage due to high transactions per second (TPS), but user funds remained secure throughout the incident.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/30861731177129?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Polymarket: Market betting on the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in October has risen to 91%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Polymarket, as of today, the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut in contracts predicting whether the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates in October 2025 has risen to 91%, a record high. By comparison, the probability of a 50 basis point rate cut is 4%, the probability of no change is 7%, and the probability of a rate hike is less than 1%. Total trading volume for this event has exceeded $62 million, with the most active contract being the 25 basis point rate cut, which reached $8.58 million.

data.title: US Republican lawmakers say government shutdown won't help midterm elections
data.description: In an interview, Republican Congresswoman Marjorie Greene said she doesn't believe a government shutdown will help Republicans win the midterm elections, nor does she agree with Republicans ignoring the health insurance crisis. She cited her own experience, demonstrating that prices in the United States haven't fallen. She said inflation is crushing people, and Americans are struggling to make ends meet. She emphasized that if her children were affected by this, she would abandon her political affiliation and fight for them with all her might. This generation is barely making ends meet and despairs about the future. (Jinshi)

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Declines to Two-Month Low
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Altcoin Season Index has dropped to 35, marking its lowest point in two months, as reported by Coinmarketcap data. Previously, the index had reached 78 on September 20, with an average of 61 last week and 65 last month. The index indicates that in the past 90 days, approximately 35 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index serves as a real-time indicator to assess whether the current cryptocurrency market is dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the past 90 days.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Secures $460 Million for AI Data Center Transformation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Galaxy Digital has secured $460 million in private investment to transform its former Bitcoin mining facility in Texas into a large-scale artificial intelligence data center. The company announced on Friday that the transaction involves the acquisition of 12.77 million Class A shares at a price of $36 per share. The funds will be allocated for general corporate purposes and the expansion of its Helios campus, which is expected to provide 133 megawatts of IT capacity by early 2026. The deal is anticipated to close around October 17, 2025, pending approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange.

data.title: Trader Achieves Remarkable Profits in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a cryptocurrency trader known as 'Calm Order King' has demonstrated exceptional precision in recent transactions. The trader's address (0x9b8…) opened short positions on Bitcoin (BTC) and Solana (SOL) last night, resulting in profits nearing $3 million. Two hours ago, the SOL short position was fully closed, showcasing the trader's adept timing in market movements. Over the past 30 days, the trader has accumulated profits exceeding $10 million, consistently applying a strategy of strict profit-taking and loss-cutting, with maximum drawdowns kept under 23% in the last two months.

The trader began this month with a principal of $3 million, leveraging opportunities in mainstream cryptocurrencies to grow the account's total assets to $14.349 million, achieving an impressive return. Favoring high-leverage positions in mainstream cryptocurrencies, the trader has maintained a 100% success rate over the past seven days, including a precise short on SOL that yielded over $5.1 million in a single transaction. This performance has made the trader a focal point among active on-chain swing traders.

BlockBeats advises investors to exercise caution as the cryptocurrency market has experienced significant volatility recently, emphasizing the importance of risk management.

data.title: Solana Achieves Record Transaction Speed Amid Stress Test
data.description: According to PANews, Solana's core development team, Anza, reported that the blockchain underwent its largest stress test during a major liquidation event earlier today. Solana maintained complete stability while achieving a record-breaking transaction speed of 100,000 transactions per second (TPS). The Solana validator client, Agave, successfully managed peak traffic over six times the usual load without any decline in network performance, processing blocks with a capacity of 60 million compute units (CU).

data.title: Ethena’s yield stablecoin loses dollar peg amid historic crypto liquidations
data.description:
Ethena’s synthetic dollar fell off its peg Friday after crashing to $0. 65 on Binance, wiping out investor confidence in what was marketed as a stablecoin with yield. The stablecoin, called USDe, is supposed to stick to the value of the U. S. dollar, but then came during a brutal selloff that hit every corner of the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethenas-yield-stablecoin-loses-dollar-peg/
